arts.ttl: Man Utd scrapped plan to wear LGBT+ themed jackets after player cited religious concern
arts.sum: The Premier League is in the middle of a round of dedicated Rainbow Laces matches but players from clubs including Manchester United have taken firm stances on planned gestures

arts.ttl: Tony Young dead: Manchester United pay tribute as homegrown hero dies aged 71
arts.sum: Tony Young helped Manchester United through one of the club's major low-points in the 1970s, having grown up just a few miles from Old Trafford before making his debut for the club at 17

arts.ttl: Manchester United scrapped plans to wear pride-themed jackets after player refused
arts.sum: Rainbow Devils, Manchester United’s official LGBTQ+ supporters club, said it was disappointed after plans to wear pride-themed tracksuits before the match against Everton were scrapped

arts.ttl: Nico Williams: Ranking Spain star’s best transfer options as Arsenal, Man Utd and Chelsea battle

arts.ttl: Arsenal player visits club’s training facility for ‘informal talks’ – ‘Door open’ to Gunners exit
arts.sum: Arsenal striker Gabriel Jesus met with Palmeiras for ‘informal talks’ with the Brazilian club at their new youth training centre in June. That’s according to UOL, who say talks have been held with his former club about a return, but it is unlikely to happen. They say that Jesus ‘has the door open’ to leave The post Arsenal player visits club’s training facility for ‘informal talks’ – ‘Door open’ to Gunners exit appeared first on Sport Witness.

arts.ttl: Man Utd and Napoli swap deal for Osimhen is OFF
arts.sum: That is according to Kiss Kiss Napoli journalist Paolo Del Genio, who reports that this potential exchange is dead in the water and will not happen either in January or at the end of the season. Manchester United were discussing a potential swap deal with Napoli that would have seen Joshua Zirkzee and Victor Osimhen change clubs, but the deal is now off.

arts.ttl: Arsenal vs Manchester United: Bukayo Saka making strides to emulate idol Cristiano Ronaldo's transformation
arts.sum: Gunners star has a long way to go but a new record is in sight
